node.data: {"M36":{"lit":"նախանձեցաւ","context":"text/body/ab[28]","n":"նախանձեցաւ"},"M6616":{"lit":"նախանձեցաւ","context":"text/body/ab[7]","n":"նախանձեցաւ"},"M3119":{"lit":"նախան<lb xml:id=\"l104278869\" facs=\"#z104278869\" n=\"9\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>ձեցաւ","line":{"facs":"#z104278868","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104278868","n":"8"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"3119-136b"},"n":"նախանձեցաւ"},"M5871":{"lit":"նախանձեցաւ","line":{"facs":"#z104453805","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104453805","n":"16"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"5871.0121"},"n":"նախանձեցաւ"},"M2176":{"lit":"նախան<lb xml:id=\"l104148738\" facs=\"#z104148738\" n=\"4\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>ձեցաւ","line":{"facs":"#z104148737","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104148737","n":"3"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"2176-077a"},"n":"նախանձեցաւ"}}

{"M36":{"lit":"յաղթանդամ","context":"text/body/ab[28]","n":"յաղթանդամ"},"M6616":{"lit":"յաղթանդամ","context":"text/body/ab[7]","n":"յաղթանդամ"},"M3119":{"lit":"յաղթանդամ","line":{"facs":"#z104278870","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104278870","n":"10"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"3119-136b"},"n":"յաղթանդամ"},"M5871":{"lit":"յաղթա<lb xml:id=\"l104453807\" facs=\"#z104453807\" n=\"18\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>նդամ","line":{"facs":"#z104453806","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104453806","n":"17"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"5871.0121"},"n":"յաղթանդամ"},"M2176":{"lit":"յաղ<lb xml:id=\"l104148739\" facs=\"#z104148739\" n=\"5\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>թանդամ","line":{"facs":"#z104148738","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104148738","n":"4"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"2176-077a"},"n":"յաղթանդամ"}}
